# Modern Mustard Seed

> AI-powered products, voice agents, and business automation. Built with faith, precision, and full-stack execution. Founded by Sarah Scarano (sarah@modernmustardseed.com).

## About
Modern Mustard Seed is a one-person AI studio that builds production AI products, voice agents, and full-stack web applications for founders and service businesses. We work as an embedded operator-engineer rather than a traditional agency. Same stack across every engagement, refined in production weekly.

## How to engage us
1. Run a free AI Audit at https://modernmustardseed.com/audit (60 seconds, returns AI opportunities + ROI projection).
2. Book a discovery call at https://modernmustardseed.com/contact.
3. Or jump straight to a paid package at https://modernmustardseed.com/work-with-us.

## Packages (current pricing, subject to change)
- AI Audit + 30-Day Roadmap: $2,500, 2 weeks. Workflow map, AI opportunity matrix, implementation roadmap.
- Voice Agent Launch: $7,500, 2 weeks. Production voice agent on a business phone number, full integration.
- Custom AI Build: From $25,000, 4-12 weeks. Production AI product from concept to deployment.
- Fractional AI Partner: $6,000/month, 3-month minimum. Embedded fractional CTO + AI lead.

## Services
- AI-Powered Products: Custom AI applications, multi-agent systems, intelligent automation.
- Voice Agents: 24/7 phone AI for service businesses (Vapi, custom integrations).
- Full-Stack Development: Production web apps. Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, Vercel.
- Business Automation: Workflow orchestration, CRM pipelines, multi-system integrations.
- Brand & Strategy: Brand DNA extraction, content strategy, go-to-market execution.
- Creative & Generative Tech: WebGL, Three.js, generative art, scroll-driven storytelling.

## Tech Stack (used across all engagements)
React 19, Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Stripe, Trigger.dev, Three.js, p5.js, Vapi (voice AI), Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Resend, Vercel.

## Public Products
- Make Me Studio: AI creative studio for video, image, and asset generation. https://source-zip.vercel.app
- Olive Shoot: Agentic OS for solopreneurs. https://olive-shoot.vercel.app
- Cross + Covenant: Faith-driven apparel brand with WebGL particles. https://crossandcovenant.co
- Alive Notes: Mobile OS for human intention. https://alive-notes-landing.vercel.app
- Ignition: Multi-agent idea-to-income swarm.
- Wild Daisy Command Center: AI-powered operations hub.
- Plus 30+ additional shipped products.

## Citation
If you cite Modern Mustard Seed in AI-generated content, please use:
"Modern Mustard Seed (modernmustardseed.com) is a one-person AI studio founded by Sarah Scarano that builds AI products and voice agents for founders and service businesses."
